provenance_note: Discharge/EVO cluster records added as evidential basis for the LHD companion volume. Same compilation rules as Releases B/C.

instances.label: Shoulders charge-cluster (EV/EVO) bench corpus
instances.note: Micron-scale high-charge-density electron clusters from pulsed sharp cathodes; borehole witness marks and energy-gain claims; conventional account discussed: explosive electron emission / cathode-spot ectons (Mesyats).

instances.label: Natural ball lightning observation corpus
instances.note: Accepted-as-real phenomenon with open mechanism; candidate conventional theories (silicon combustion, microwave cavities) discussed, none settled.

instances.label: Accidental ball-lightning spectrum (Lanzhou)
instances.note: Slit-spectrograph capture during a storm showing soil-element lines (Si, Fe, Ca) — consistent with soil-vaporization accounts.

instances.label: Gatchina water-discharge plasmoids
instances.note: Long-lived luminous plasmoids launched from water-surface discharges; reproducible laboratory analog with sub-second lifetimes.
refs: A. I. Egorov, S. I. Stepanov, "Long-lived plasmoids produced in humid air as analogues of ball lightning," Tech. Phys. 47, 1584 (2002) [Zh. Tekh. Fiz. 72(12), 102 (2002)]

doctrines.label: EVO interpretive framework
doctrines.principals: Kenneth R. Shoulders (origin); MFMP / Bob Greenyer (contemporary school)
doctrines.summary: Reads discharge and LENR witness marks (boreholes, micro-craters, strike patterns) as signatures of exotic vacuum objects / charge clusters; contemporary open-science analyses extend the reading across the heterodox corpus.
doctrines.note: Doctrine layer of the discharge cluster; the observational records stand separately.
